wall_fidelity.evidence: 10 deterministic heuristics ran: gates_self_check 4/4 true; 35 walls extruded matching consensus.walls; slivers_removed=0; PlanShell_Group continuous in render. Side-by-side confirms SKP outline matches PDF L-footprint.

door_fidelity.evidence: DoorLeaf_Group count = 7 == count(kind_v5=interior_door) = 7 (new check). All DoorLeaf bbox z_min approx 0 (no floating door). Iso shows door swings hosted in walls. No door_count_mismatch, no floating_door.

window_fidelity.evidence: WindowGlass_Group count = 4 == count(kind_v5=window) = 4 (PR #195 invariant + new no-duplicate check). Each height_m=1.2 in [0.9,1.5] range (peitoril+verga preserved per FP-024). z_min approx 0.9m (not full-height void). 1 GlazedBalcony_Group height 2.7m correctly NOT counted as window.

room_fidelity.evidence: 8 Floor_Group vs 11 semantic ambients. Two cells fuse open-plan ambients with no PDF wall trace: r001 (A.S./TERRACO SOCIAL/TERRACO TECNICO), r002 (SALA DE JANTAR/SALA DE ESTAR). Honest baseline per lessons_learned.md #4. Promotion to PASS requires semantic_zones overlay tool.

scale_rotation.evidence: Inline review of side_by_side_pdf_vs_skp.png (Claude Code 2026-05-29 maturity 2 run): PDF outline (left) and SKP top (center) have identical L-footprint with TERRACO SOCIAL extending south, COZINHA NW corner, SUITE 01 NE, SUITE 02/BANHO 02/LAVABO arrangement. bbox_m approx 17.7 x 10.5 m consistent with PDF 74.93 m^2. 0 deg rotation.

global_visual.evidence: Inline review of model_top.png + model_iso.png + side_by_side composite: apartamento habitavel recognizable; no floating geometry, no orphan glass, no misplaced soft barriers, no wall stubs, no floor leaks. Door swings shown at each doorway. Glazed balcony tall on west facade. Matches FP-030 good_real_baseline example. NOTE: bridge unavailable; promoter is Claude inline (not oracle). With chatgpt_bridge running, this axis would be promoted by the bridge.

verified_passes.evidence: sb005 mapped to PDF label PEITORIL H=1,10M between TERRACO TECNICO and SUITE 02. Carried from PR #200 verification.
